Invalid DateTime

Notes on my Coursera Course

  • The coding parts consisted of a video and a "Lab". I still haven't figured out what the Lab exactly does. But it all was rather boring. I didn't understand jupyterlab or what it was. It wasn't mentioned in the course notes. After I reached Module 2, I figured out it is only reading and reading. What good is this "lab" if I have to read everything anyway? There is no hands-on practice.
  • Apparently, I study better in the evening.
